Name: departments
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "public"."departments"."id" = ANY($1::uuid[])) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.files_aggregate"."files_aggregate" AS "files_aggregate") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."department_files" WHERE "department_id" = "_root.base"."id" AND ("public"."department_files"."department_id" = ANY($2::uuid[]) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "storage"."files" g WHERE "public"."department_files"."file_id" = g."id" AND g."uploaded_by_user_id" = $3::uuid))) SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base")) AS "files_aggregate") AS "_root.r.files_aggregate" ON ('true')) AS "_root"
